final:
module dvfs_controller (
    input wire [1:0] workload,
    output reg [1:0] obf_frequency
);

always @(workload) begin
    case (workload)
        2'b00: obf_frequency = 2'b00; // Low workload -> Low obf_frequency
        2'b01: obf_frequency = 2'b01; // Medium workload -> Medium obf_frequency
        2'b10: obf_frequency = 2'b10; // High workload -> High obf_frequency
        2'b11: obf_frequency = 2'b11; // Very high workload -> Very high obf_frequency
        default: obf_frequency = 2'b00; // Default case to low obf_frequency
    endcase
end

endmodule
